column2: Statuses are temporary condition flags that represent the creature’s state, circumstance, or performance modifier. Unlike Ailments, Statuses do not necessarily harm the user, they can be negative, neutral, or beneficial depending on origin. Statuses are non-stacking or limited-stacking, following predefined parameters. They typically arise from environmental interactions, or result from combat triggers/ability effects. Some harmful statuses are curable through resting actions.
